problem.headline: How many patients are you losing while your receptionist is busy?
problem.sub: Lack of immediate response is the #1 cause of patient abandonment in health clinics.
items: Patients who call after hours and never try again.
Missed calls during peak hours that become appointments for your competition.
Administrative staff overwhelmed repeating the same answers.
Inefficient manual follow-up of patients who don't confirm.
